summary: Tested new market-correlation endpoint and EmergingTab/EmergingCompetenceCard frontend components. Fixed critical bug: useState was used instead of useEffect for loading market correlation data. All 9 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified correctly shows 'Analysez votre CV' message for new users and hides market correlation banner when no data.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - minor accessibility issue (pre-existing)

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: EmergingTab.jsx line 52 used useState instead of useEffect for side effect (loading market correlation data). Changed to useEffect and added useEffect to imports.
test_credentials: Test accounts created dynamically with unique pseudos during testing
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - tests create their own test accounts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Market correlation feature fully tested. Backend endpoint GET /api/emerging/market-correlation?token= returns has_data=false when no emerging competences, and returns correlations with market_match, sector_matches, market_position when data exists. Frontend EmergingTab shows market correlation banner (data-testid='market-correlation-banner') only when has_data=true. EmergingCompetenceCard shows market position badge (data-testid='market-position-badge') and market match info (data-testid='market-match-info'). Fixed critical bug: useState was incorrectly used instead of useEffect for loading market correlation data.

backend_apis: GET /api/emerging/market-correlation?token= - returns has_data=false when no emerging competences (PASSED)
Invalid token handling for all endpoints (PASSED)
frontend_flows: EmergingTab shows 'Analysez votre CV pour détecter automatiquement les compétences émergentes' message when no competences detected (PASSED)
EmergingTab does NOT show market correlation banner when has_data=false (PASSED)
EmergingTab shows Filtres and Actualiser buttons (PASSED)

bug_fixed.issue: useState was used instead of useEffect for loading market correlation data on line 52
bug_fixed.fix: Changed useState to useEffect and added useEffect to imports
bug_fixed.impact: Market correlation data was not being loaded properly due to incorrect React hook usage
